name: daily-fresh fetch: per-operation gate passes a source whose last fetched_at is within fetch_frequency window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/google-tsguide.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id google-tsguide --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z && echo ok 1>&2
